REMITTITUR FILED SUPERIOR COURT FINDS THAT APPELLANT'S ORAL REQUEST MADE AT HEARING FOR A CONTINUANCE IS DENIED. FURTHER, THIS COURT FINDS APPELLANT FAILED TO DEMONSTRATE ERROR IN THE COURT BELOW AND THUS AFFIRMS THE JUDGMENT. ADDITIONALLY, THIS COURT DENIES RESPONDENT'S ORAL MOTION FOR SANCTIONS ON THE GROUND THAT IT WAS UNTIMELY; RESPONDENT FAILED TO COMPLY WITH CRC 26, FOR THAT REASON, DECLINE TO AWARD THE TARDILY REQUESTED SANCTIONS.
BOND/UNDERTAKING IN THE AMOUNT OF $10,759.00, EXECUTED BY MICHAEL HARRIS AND LISSA HARRIS FILED BY DEFENDANT TISHGART, KENNETH
